pk_tuples.notes: Study A8081074 BE study in healthy adults. Reviewer's independent analysis of single 250 mg crizotinib FC (commercial capsule) under fasted conditions. Units reported as 'µg/mL' for Cmax and 'h*µg/mL' for AUCinf in table, but values (108, 2641.5) match known Xalkori PK only if interpreted as ng/mL and ng·h/mL—possibly mislabeled column header.

pk_tuples.dose_original: 250 mg single dose, oral pellets (eMS) unencapsulated
pk_tuples.notes: Study A8081074, crizotinib 250 mg oral pellets (unencapsulated). Units labeled 'µg/mL' and 'h*µg/mL' but values match ng/mL and ng·h/mL.

pk_tuples.dose_original: 250 mg single dose, oral pellets (eMS) encapsulated
pk_tuples.notes: Study A8081074, crizotinib 250 mg oral pellets (encapsulated). Units labeled 'µg/mL' and 'h*µg/mL' but values match ng/mL and ng·h/mL.
